      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @example Basic usage
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            

            
              
            

                  #   success(result: { order_id: "123", total: 100.00 })
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @example With metadata
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            

            
              
            

                  #   success(
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     result: { validated: true },
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     metadata: { processing_time_ms: 125 }
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            
              
            

                  #   )
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @example Using result_data alias (batch processing pattern)
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            
              
            

                  #   success(
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     result_data: { batch_processing_outcome: outcome },
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     metadata: { worker_count: 5 }
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            

            
              
            

                  #   )
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  def success(result: nil, result_data: nil, metadata: {})
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Accept either result: or result_data: for flexibility
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            
              10
            

            
              
            

                    actual_result = result || result_data
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            
              10
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 10
                
              
            

                    raise ArgumentError, 'result or result_data required' if actual_result.nil?
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            
              10
            

            
              
            

                    TaskerCore::Types::StepHandlerCallResult.success(
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            
              
            

                      result: actual_result,
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            
              
            

                      metadata: metadata
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            
              
            

                    )
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Return a standardized error result from a step handler
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            
              
            

                  # This wraps TaskerCore::Types::StepHandlerCallResult.error() to provide
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            
              
            

                  # a convenient API for handlers to return error results.
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Note: In most cases, you should raise TaskerCore exceptions instead
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            
              
            

                  # of returning error results. This method is provided for cases where
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            
              
            

                  # you need to return an error without raising an exception.
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @param message [String] Human-readable error message
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @param error_type [String] Type of error (PermanentError, RetryableError, etc.)
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @param error_code [String, nil] Optional error code
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @param retryable [Boolean] Whether to retry this error
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @param metadata [Hash] Additional error context
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @return [TaskerCore::Types::StepHandlerCallResult::Error] Error result
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @example Permanent error
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            
              
            

                  #   failure(
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     message: "Invalid order total",
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     error_type: "PermanentError",
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     error_code: "INVALID_TOTAL",
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     retryable: false,
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     metadata: { total: -50 }
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            
              
            

                  #   )
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            
              
            

                  # @example Retryable error
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            
              
            

                  #   failure(
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     message: "API temporarily unavailable",
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     error_type: "RetryableError",
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     retryable: true,
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            
              
            

                  #     metadata: { service: "payment_gateway" }
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            
              
            

                  #   )
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  def failure(message:, error_type: 'UnexpectedError', error_code: nil, retryable: false, metadata: {})
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            
              
            

                    TaskerCore::Types::StepHandlerCallResult.error(
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            
              
            

                      error_type: error_type,
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            
              
            

                      message: message,
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            
              
            

                      error_code: error_code,
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            
              
            

                      retryable: retryable,
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            
              
            

                      metadata: metadata
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            
              
            

                    )
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            
              
            

                  # ========================================================================
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            
              
            

                  # RAILS ENGINE INTEGRATION NOTES
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            
              
            

                  # ========================================================================
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            
              
            

                  # NOTE: In the Rails engine execution flow, step handlers are called via:
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            
              
            

                  # 1. TaskHandler.handle(task) → WorkflowCoordinator
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            
              
            

                  # 2. WorkflowCoordinator → TaskHandler.handle_one_step(task, sequence, step)
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            
              
            

                  # 3. handle_one_step → get_step_handler(step) → step_handler.call(task, sequence, step)
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            
              
            

                  # The Rust foundation provides the same flow, so there's no need for a separate
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            
              
            

                  # execute_step method. The Rails engine signature process(task, sequence, step)
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            
              
            

                  # is the main entry point that frameworks call.
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            
              
            

                  #
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            
              
            

                  # The lifecycle management (events, error handling, retries) is handled by:
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            
              
            

                  # - Rust orchestration layer with TaskHandler/WorkflowCoordinator foundation
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            
              
            

                  # - Ruby subclasses provide business logic hooks via call()
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            
              
            

                  # ========================================================================
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            
              
            

                  # INTERNAL PROCESSING METHODS
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            
              
            

                  # ========================================================================
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  private
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Validate step configuration before execution
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  def validate_step_configuration(config_hash)
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Basic validation - subclasses can override for specific requirements
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            
              
            

                    config_hash.is_a?(Hash)
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Extract step information for logging
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  def extract_step_info(step)
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            
              
            

                    {
          
      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            
              
            

                      step_id: extract_attribute(step, :id) || extract_attribute(step, :workflow_step_uuid),
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            
              
            

                      step_name: extract_attribute(step, :name),
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            
              
            

                      step_class: step.class.name
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            

            
              
            

                    }
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Extract task information for logging
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  def extract_task_info(task)
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            

            
              
            

                    {
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            
              
            

                      task_uuid: extract_attribute(task, :task_uuid) || extract_attribute(task, :id),
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            

            
              
            

                      task_class: task.class.name
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            
              
            

                    }
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Safe attribute extraction from Ruby objects
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  def extract_attribute(object, attribute)
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                    object.respond_to?(attribute) ? object.send(attribute) : nil
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            

            
              
            

                  rescue StandardError
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            
              
            

                    nil
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Validate process method result
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  def validate_process_result(result)
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
            

                    unless result.is_a?(Hash)
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            

            
              
            

                      raise TaskerCore::PermanentError.new(
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            

            
              
            

                        "Step process method must return Hash, got #{result.class}",
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            

            
              
            

                        error_code: 'INVALID_PROCESS_RESULT',
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            

            
              
            

                        error_category: 'validation'
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            

            
              
            

                      )
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                    return if result.key?(:status) || result.key?('status')
          
      271. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    271. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            

            
              
            

                    logger.warn('Step process result missing status field - assuming success')
          
      273. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    273. 
            

            
              
            

                    result[:status] = 'completed'
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      275. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    275. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      276. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    276. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Classify unexpected errors into permanent vs retryable
          
      277. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    277. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  def classify_unexpected_error(error, _context)
          
      278. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    278. 
            

            
              
            

                    case error
          
      279. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    279. 
            

            
              
            

                    when ArgumentError, TypeError, NoMethodError
          
      280. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    280. 
            

            
              
                
                  when: 0
                
              
            

                      # Programming errors are permanent
          
      281. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    281. 
            

            
              
            

                      TaskerCore::PermanentError.new(
          
      282. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    282. 
            

            
              
            

                        "Programming error in step handler: #{error.message}",
          
      283. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    283. 
            

            
              
            

                        error_code: 'PROGRAMMING_ERROR',
          
      284. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    284. 
            

            
              
            

                        error_category: 'validation',
          
      285. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    285. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                        context: { original_error: error.class.name, backtrace: error.backtrace&.first(5) }
          
      286. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    286. 
            

            
              
            

                      )
          
      287. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    287. 
            

            
              
            

                    when Timeout::Error
          
      288. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    288. 
            

            
              
                
                  when: 0
                
              
            

                      # Timeouts are retryable
          
      289. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    289. 
            

            
              
            

                      TaskerCore::RetryableError.new(
          
      290. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    290. 
            

            
              
            

                        "Step handler timeout: #{error.message}",
          
      291. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    291. 
            

            
              
            

                        error_category: 'timeout',
          
      292. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    292. 
            

            
              
            

                        context: { timeout_class: error.class.name }
          
      293. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    293. 
            

            
              
            

                      )
          
      294. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    294. 
            

            
              
            

                    when IOError, SystemCallError
          
      295. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    295. 
            

            
              
                
                  when: 0
                
              
            

                      # IO errors are usually retryable
          
      296. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    296. 
            

            
              
            

                      TaskerCore::RetryableError.new(
          
      297. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    297. 
            

            
              
            

                        "IO error in step handler: #{error.message}",
          
      298. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    298. 
            

            
              
            

                        error_category: 'network',
          
      299. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    299. 
            

            
              
            

                        context: { io_error_class: error.class.name }
          
      300. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    300. 
            

            
              
            

                      )
          
      301. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    301. 
            

            
              
            

                    else
          
      302. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    302. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                      # Unknown errors - assume retryable for safety
          
      303. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    303. 
            

            
              
            

                      logger.error("Unexpected error in step handler: #{error.class} - #{error.message}")
          
      304. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    304. 
            

            
              
            

                      TaskerCore::RetryableError.new(
          
      305. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    305. 
            

            
              
            

                        "Unexpected error in step handler: #{error.message}",
          
      306. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    306. 
            

            
              
            

                        error_category: 'unknown',
          
      307. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    307. 
            

            
              
            

                        context: {
          
      308. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    308. 
            

            
              
            

                          original_error: error.class.name,
          
      309. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    309. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                          backtrace: error.backtrace&.first(5)
          
      310. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    310. 
            

            
              
            

                        }
          
      311. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    311. 
            

            
              
            

                      )
          
      312. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    312. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      313. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    313. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      314. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    314. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      315. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    315. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Format successful result for Rust layer
          
      316. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    316. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  def format_success_result(result, duration)
          
      317. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    317. 
            

            
              
            

                    {
          
      318. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    318. 
            

            
              
            

                      status: 'completed',
          
      319. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    319. 
            

            
              
            

                      success: true,
          
      320. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    320. 
            

            
              
            

                      data: result,
          
      321. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    321.

                        response = http_request(method, path, params: params)
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            
              
            

                        page_data = response[:data] || response['data'] || []
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            
              
            

                        # Process page with block if provided
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
            

                        if block_given?
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            
              
            

                          yield(page_data)
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                        else
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            
              
            

                          results.concat(Array(page_data))
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            
              
            

                        end
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            
              
            

                        # Check for next page
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            
              
            

                        pagination_value = extract_pagination_cursor(response, pagination_key)
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
            

                        break unless pagination_value && page_data.any?
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            
              
            

                      end
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            
              
            

                      results
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190.

      191.

    193. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Return a successful API response result
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            
              
            

                    #
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param data [Object] Response data
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param status [Integer] HTTP status code
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param headers [Hash] Response headers
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param execution_time_ms [Integer] Execution time in milliseconds
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param metadata [Hash] Additional metadata
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @return [StepHandlerCallResult] Success result
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    def api_success(data:, status: 200, headers: {}, execution_time_ms: nil, metadata: {})
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            
              
            

                      result = {
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            
              
            

                        'data' => data,
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            
              
            

                        'status' => status,
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            
              
            

                        'headers' => headers
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            
              
            

                      }
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                      result['execution_time_ms'] = execution_time_ms if execution_time_ms
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            
              
            

                      success(result: result, metadata: metadata.merge(api_call: true))
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Return a failed API response result
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            
              
            

                    #
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param message [String] Error message
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param status [Integer] HTTP status code
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param error_type [String] Error type classification
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param headers [Hash] Response headers
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param execution_time_ms [Integer] Execution time in milliseconds
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param metadata [Hash] Additional metadata
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @return [StepHandlerCallResult] Error result
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    def api_failure(message:, status: nil, error_type: nil, headers: {}, execution_time_ms: nil, metadata: {})
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            
              
            

                      # Classify error type based on status code if not provided
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            
              
            

                      classified_error_type = error_type || classify_error_type(status)
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            
              
            

                      retryable = retryable_status?(status)
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            
              
            

                      failure(
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            
              
            

                        message: message,
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            
              
            

                        error_type: classified_error_type,
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            
              
            

                        retryable: retryable,
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            
              
            

                        metadata: metadata.merge(
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            
              
            

                          api_call: true,
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            
              
            

                          status: status,
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            

            
              
            

                          headers: headers,
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            

            
              
            

                          execution_time_ms: execution_time_ms
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            
              
            

                        ).compact
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            
              
            

                      )
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238.

      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            
              
            

                    # ========================================================================
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            
              
            

                    # RESPONSE PROCESSING
          
      242.

      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Process HTTP response and classify errors
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            
              
            

                    # @param response [Faraday::Response] HTTP response to process
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    def process_response(response)
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                      return response if response.success?
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            

            
              
            

                      case response.status
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            
              
            

                      when 400, 401, 403, 404, 422
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            
              
                
                  when: 0
                
              
            

                        # Client errors - permanent failures (don't retry)
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            
              
            

                        raise TaskerCore::PermanentError.new(
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            

            
              
            

                          "HTTP #{response.status}: #{response.reason_phrase}",
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            

            
              
            

                          error_code: "HTTP_#{response.status}",
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            
              
            

                          error_category: classify_client_error(response.status),
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            

            
              
            

                          context: {
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            
              
            

                            status: response.status,
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            
              
            

                            body: response.body,
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            
              
            

                            headers: response.headers.to_h
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            

            
              
            

                          }
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            

            
              
            

                        )
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            

            
              
            

                      when 429
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            

            
              
                
                  when: 0
                
              
            

                        # Rate limiting - retryable with server-suggested backoff
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            

            
              
            

                        retry_after = extract_retry_after_header(response.headers)
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            

            
              
            

                        raise TaskerCore::RetryableError.new(
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            

            
              
            

                          "Rate limited: #{response.reason_phrase}",
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            

            
              
            

                          retry_after: retry_after,
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            

            
              
            

                          error_category: 'rate_limit',
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            

            
              
            

                          context: {
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            

            
              
            

                            status: response.status,
          
      271. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    271. 
            

            
              
            

                            retry_after: retry_after,
          
      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            

            
              
            

                            body: response.body,
          
      273. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    273. 
            

            
              
            

                            headers: response.headers.to_h
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274. 
            

            
              
            

                          }
          
      275. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    275. 
            

            
              
            

                        )
          
      276. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    276. 
            

            
              
            

                      when 503
          
      277. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    277. 
            

            
              
                
                  when: 0
                
              
            

                        # Service unavailable - retryable with server-suggested backoff
          
      278. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    278. 
            

            
              
            

                        retry_after = extract_retry_after_header(response.headers)
          
      279. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    279. 
            

            
              
            

                        raise TaskerCore::RetryableError.new(
          
      280. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    280. 
            

            
              
            

                          "Service unavailable: #{response.reason_phrase}",
          
      281. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    281. 
            

            
              
            

                          retry_after: retry_after,
          
      282. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    282. 
            

            
              
            

                          error_category: 'service_unavailable',
          
      283. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    283. 
            

            
              
            

                          context: {
          
      284. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    284. 
            

            
              
            

                            status: response.status,
          
      285. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    285. 
            

            
              
            

                            retry_after: retry_after,
          
      286. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    286. 
            

            
              
            

                            body: response.body,
          
      287. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    287. 
            

            
              
            

                            headers: response.headers.to_h
          
      288. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    288. 
            

            
              
            

                          }
          
      289. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    289. 
            

            
              
            

                        )
          
      290. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    290. 
            

            
              
            

                      when 500..599
          
      291. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    291. 
            

            
              
                
                  when: 0
                
              
            

                        # Other server errors - retryable without forced backoff
          
      292. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    292. 
            

            
              
            

                        raise TaskerCore::RetryableError.new(
          
      293. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    293. 
            

            
              
            

                          "Server error: HTTP #{response.status} #{response.reason_phrase}",
          
      294. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    294. 
            

            
              
            

                          error_category: 'server_error',
          
      295. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    295. 
            

            
              
            

                          context: {
          
      296. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    296. 
            

            
              
            

                            status: response.status,
          
      297. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    297. 
            

            
              
            

                            body: response.body,
          
      298. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    298. 
            

            
              
            

                            headers: response.headers.to_h
          
      299. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    299. 
            

            
              
            

                          }
          
      300. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    300. 
            

            
              
            

                        )
          
      301. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    301. 
            

            
              
            

                      else
          
      302. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    302. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                        # Unknown status codes - treat as retryable for safety
          
      303. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    303. 
            

            
              
            

                        raise TaskerCore::RetryableError.new(
          
      304. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    304. 
            

            
              
            

                          "Unknown HTTP status: #{response.status} #{response.reason_phrase}",
          
      305. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    305. 
            

            
              
            

                          error_category: 'unknown',
          
      306. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    306. 
            

            
              
            

                          context: {
          
      307. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    307. 
            

            
              
            

                            status: response.status,
          
      308. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    308. 
            

            
              
            

                            body: response.body,
          
      309. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    309. 
            

            
              
            

                            headers: response.headers.to_h
          
      310. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    310. 
            

            
              
            

                          }
          
      311. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    311. 
            

            
              
            

                        )
          
      312. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    312. 
            

            
              
            

                      end
          
      313. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    313. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      314. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    314. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      315. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    315. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    private
          
      316. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    316. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      317. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    317. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Classify error type based on HTTP status code
          
      318. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    318. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    def classify_error_type(status)
          
      319. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    319. 
            

            
              
                
                  when: 0
                
              
            

                      case status
          
      320. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    320. 
            

            
              
                
                  when: 0
                
              
            

                      when 400..499 then 'PermanentError'
          
      321. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    321. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                      when 500..599 then 'RetryableError'
          
      322. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    322. 
            

            
              
            

                      else 'UnexpectedError'
          
      323. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    323. 
            

            
              
            

                      end
          
      324. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    324. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      325. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    325. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      326. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    326. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Determine if status code indicates retryable error
          
      327. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    327. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    def retryable_status?(status)
          
      328. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    328. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                      return false if status.nil?
          
      329. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    329. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      330. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    330. 
            

            
              
            

                      status >= 500 || status == 429
          
      331. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    331. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      332. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    332. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      333. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    333. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    def get_merged_api_config(config)
          
      334. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    334. 
            

            
              
            

                      ::TaskerCore::ConfigSchemas::API_CONFIG_SCHEMA.dup.merge(config)
          
      335. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    335. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      336. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    336. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      337. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    337. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Build Faraday connection with configuration
          
      338. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    338. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    def build_faraday_connection
          
      339. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    339. 
            

            
              
            

                      base_url = config[:url] || config['url']
          
      340. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    340. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      341. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    341. 
            

            
              
            

                      Faraday.new(base_url) do |conn|
          
      342. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    342. 
            

            
              
            

                        # Apply configuration
          
      343. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    343. 
            

            
              
            

                        apply_connection_config(conn)
          
      344. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    344. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      345. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    345. 
            

            
              
            

                        # Apply custom configuration block if provided
          
      346. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    346. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
            

                        yield(conn) if block_given?
          
      347. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    347. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      348. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    348. 
            

            
              
            

                        # Default adapter (must be last)
          
      349. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    349. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 0
                
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
            

                        conn.adapter Faraday.default_adapter unless conn.builder.handlers.any? { |h| h.klass < Faraday::Adapter }
          
      350. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    350. 
            

            
              
            

                      end
          
      351. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    351. 
            

            
              
            

                    end
          
      352. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    352. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      353. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    353. 
            

            
              
            

                    # Apply configuration to Faraday connection
          
      354. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    354. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    def apply_connection_config(conn)
          
      355. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    355. 
            

            
              
            

                      # Get API timeouts from configuration
          
      356. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    356. 
            

            
              
            

                      api_timeouts = TaskerCore::Config.instance.api_timeouts
          
      357. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    357. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      358.
